name: electroplankton-decomp
title: Chaos Viewer
compiler: mwccarm (version TBD — see notes/compiler.md). Trial flags (C): -O4,p -enum int -lang c99 -char signed -interworking -proc arm946e -gccext,on -msgstyle gcc
setup: clone {github} and follow CONTRIBUTING.md. Supply your own legally dumped Electroplankton .nds, unpack locally (dsd), place mwccarm under tools/mwccarm/ (gitignored).
readFirst: README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, notes/compiler.md, notes/legal.md. Coordinate via CLAIMS.md.
rules: only your own legally dumped ROM; never commit the ROM, its assets, or extracted binaries - the one deliberate exception is annotated disassembly TEXT of still-unmatched functions on the chaos-data branch (text, not bytes/assets), same practice as other decomp projects committing .s files; write all C from scratch.
